meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Students: Build Your First SaaS with Antigravity Template
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no SaaS knowledge' barrier. Learn to build your first project using the Antigravity template and Claude Code in this expert-led guide.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template acts as your architectural blueprint, abstracting complex infrastructure so you can focus on core logic. By pairing it with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate generation and deployment, effectively bypassing the steep learning curve of traditional SaaS development to launch a professional-grade application immediately.
content.intro:
The blank editor is the student's greatest adversary. You have the ambition to build, but the mountain of infrastructure—authentication, database schemas, and API routing—feels like an impenetrable fortress. You aren't just missing code; you're missing the mental model of how a professional SaaS ecosystem actually breathes.

This guide marks the end of your 'tutorial hell.' We are stripping away the noise to show you exactly how to scaffold a production-ready application using the Antigravity template. By the time you reach the final step, you won't just have a project; you will have a scalable foundation that commands respect in any technical interview.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your project structure using the Antigravity CLI to ensure all essential security and database layers are pre-configured.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity template with support for Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe integration.

steps.title: Define Your Data Schema
steps.description: Use Claude Code to translate your business logic into a robust relational database schema that fits your specific niche.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a project management tool including users, projects, and task tables with appropriate foreign keys.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema based on the provided business requirements'

steps.title: Configure Authentication Middleware
steps.description: Implement secure session management to ensure your application handles user state effectively from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up protected routes and authentication middleware using the Antigravity auth module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'configure auth middleware for protected dashboard routes'

steps.title: Build the Core Feature Set
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to iterate on your MVP features, focusing on clean, modular code that adheres to the Antigravity design pattern.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for handling project creation and validation within the existing architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'implement the project creation service with Zod validation'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Finalize your environment variables and deploy your scaffolded application to a live server for immediate testing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current configuration for deployment readiness and provide the final build command.
steps.claude_code_command: npm run build && antigravity-cli deploy --target production

pro_tips: Always use Zod for schema validation; it prevents 90% of runtime errors in user-facing forms.
Decouple your business logic from your UI components to make your app refactor-proof.
Treat your environment variables as sensitive assets; use a .env.example file to document requirements for collaborators.
Leverage Claude Code's memory by providing a summary of your architectural decisions at the start of each session.
Prioritize 'feature flags' early, allowing you to hide incomplete modules while testing your core SaaS flow.
content.next_steps: After completing your deployment, focus on implementing a single 'killer feature' that differentiates your app from generic clones. Once ready, push your code to GitHub and document your process in a README file to showcase your engineering rigor to potential employers.
content.conversion_block: Stop dreaming about your SaaS and start architecting it. With Antigravity and Claude Code, you have the leverage of a senior engineer at your fingertips. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
